bibliographic_info.title: Orbit and clock combination of PPP-B2b, HAS and MADOCA-PPP at the user end: with emphasis on the improvement of global real-time precise point positioning

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Measurement 279 (2026) 121739 Contents lists available at ScienceDirect Measurement journal homepage: www.elsevier.com/locate/measurement Orbit and clock combination of PPP-B2b, HAS and MADOCA-PPP at the user end: with emphasis on the improvement of global real-time precise point positioning Guo Chena, Qiang Zhanga,* , Tianfeng Shenb, Zhigang Hua, Qile Zhaoa,c aGNSS Research Cent

129 Luoyu Road, Wuhan 430079, China A R T I C L E I N F O A B S T R A C T Keywords: The limited geographical coverage of regional PPP-B2b, MADOCA-PPP and Galileo initial High Accuracy Service PPP-B2b (HAS), precludes their use for global real-time high-precision positioning.
